# Paylix SDK
> Open-source crypto payment SDK for developers. USDC on Base.

## Docs
- Getting Started: /
- SDK Reference: /sdk-reference
  - Checkout & Verification: /sdk-reference/checkout
  - Payments: /sdk-reference/payments
  - Subscriptions: /sdk-reference/subscriptions
  - Portal & Invoices: /sdk-reference/portal
  - Webhook Management: /sdk-reference/webhooks
- Webhooks: /webhooks
- Subscriptions: /subscriptions
- Customers: /customers
- Products: /products
- Invoices: /invoices
- Self-Hosting: /self-hosting
- Full reference for LLMs: /llms-full.txt
